reviews.comment:
No pude pagar con ningun medio a traves de la app, lo cual me generó un perjuicio economico, financiero, ademas no haber podido acceder a todos los “beneficios”. Extremadamente disconforme.
Ya puse una queja a través de la app y hasta que no se me reconozca el dinero extra que tuve que pagar no cambiare esta calificación.

(Translated by Google)
I couldn't pay through the app using any method, which caused me financial hardship, and I also couldn't access all the "benefits." Extremely dissatisfied.
I've already filed a complaint through the app, and I won't change this rating until I'm reimbursed for the extra money I had to pay.
